title: How to address - "Unsupported: Timing control statement in this location"

features.name: interface_task_posedge_timing
features.description: Code should include an interface with a task that contains @(posedge clk) timing control statements

features.name: multiple_posedge_in_task
features.description: Code should include a task containing multiple @(posedge clk) timing control statements

features.name: timing_control_in_while_loop_task
features.description: Code should include a task with a while loop that contains @(posedge clk) timing control

features.name: interface_modport_task
features.description: Code should include an interface with modport declarations and a task with timing controls
